title: Dashboard
description: Aggregate training, machine status, and live analytics in one command center.

title: Training
description: AI-driven programs, exercise queues, and adaptive session control built around your performance.

title: Nutrition
description: Real-time macro targets, hydration tracking, and peri-workout fuel guidance tuned to each session.

title: Biometrics
description: Live heart rate, symmetry, LiDAR motion capture, and readiness analytics for safer, smarter training.

title: Recovery
description: Sleep, HRV, fatigue, and injury-risk tracking that informs automatic recovery recommendations.

title: AI Coach
description: Context-aware coaching, tempo correction, and personalized protocol guidance in real time.
